case_title: SAUSALITO FASHION'S VS LIPWORTH, STEPHEN DBA SIGN A RAMA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $752.86 FILED BY SAUSALITO FASHION'S AS TO DEFENDANT LIPWORTH, STEPHEN DBA SIGN A RAMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAUSALITO FASHION'S IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIPWORTH, STEPHEN DBA SIGN A RAMA PROOF OF SERVICE WAIVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
